entity.label: Mattithiah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: The eldest son of Shallum, of the family of Korah (1 Chr. 9:31).

nodes.label: Mattithiah
nodes.description: The eldest son of Shallum, of the family of Korah (1 Chr. 9:31).

nodes.label: Shallum
nodes.description: A keeper of the gate in the reign of David (1 Chr. 9:17).

verses.text: And Mattithiah, one of the Levites, who was the firstborn of Shallum the Korahite, had the set office over the things that were made in the pans.
